name_local: Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore

phrases.text_local: Scusi, qual è l'ingresso per la cupola, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, kwahl EH ling-GRES-so per lah KOO-poh-lah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: La fila per la cupola è là.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAH FEE-lah PEHR LAH koo-POH-lah È LÀ
likely_response.translation_en: The line for the dome is there.

responses.english: The line for the dome is there.
responses.phonetic: LAH FEE-lah PEHR LAH koo-POH-lah È LÀ
responses.local: La fila per la cupola è là.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un codice di abbigliamento, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon KOH-dee-cheh dee ab-bee-lyah-MEN-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprite, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-rah ah-PREE-teh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa salire sulla cupola, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-tah sah-LEE-reh SOOL-lah KOO-poh-lah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si può usare l'ascensore, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see pwOH oo-ZAH-reh la-shen-SOH-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: No, solo scale per la cupola.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOH SOH-loh SKAH-leh PEHR LAH koo-POH-lah
likely_response.translation_en: No, only stairs for the dome.

responses.english: No, only stairs for the dome.
responses.phonetic: NOH SOH-loh SKAH-leh PEHR LAH koo-POH-lah
responses.local: No, solo scale per la cupola.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è il Battistero, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel bat-TEE-steh-roh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Di fronte alla chiesa, sulla piazza.
likely_response.pronunciation: DEE FROHN-teh AHL-lah kee-EH-sah SOOL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah
likely_response.translation_en: Opposite the church, on the square.

responses.english: Opposite the church, on the square.
responses.phonetic: DEE FROHN-teh AHL-lah kee-EH-sah SOOL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah
responses.local: Di fronte alla chiesa, sulla piazza.
